page_metadata.biotools__summary: Circr is a computational tool for the prediction of miRNA:circRNA associations. It combines publicly available algorithms for de novo prediction of miRNA binding sites on target sequences with experimentally validated miRNA-AGO and miRNA:RNA sites in different organisms.
